description_long: This humanoid robot features a rectangular head with a digital display face, showing expressive pixelated eyes and a smiling mouth. The head is equipped with two thin antennae and rounded blue ear-like structures on each side. Its torso is boxy and white, with subtle blue accents and three vertical lines suggesting control or indicator panels. The arms and legs are segmented, with gray joints and white, rounded forearms and shins, ending in mitten-like hands and boot-shaped feet. The robot's overall design is friendly and approachable, with a smooth, plastic-like finish and a compact, balanced build. The color palette is primarily white, gray, and light blue, giving it a modern, clean appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A friendly, white and blue humanoid robot with a digital display face, antennae, and rounded limbs, featuring a smooth, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's expressive digital face, antennae, and symmetrical arms and legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the robot's slim profile, rounded ear structures, and the depth of its head and torso.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the smooth, featureless back of the head and torso, with visible arm and leg joints.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the same slim profile and rounded features.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides and legs straight, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; the robot has integrated panels and smooth, decorative blue and white coverings.
attribute_facial_features: The face is a black digital display with pixelated blue eyes and a smiling mouth, no nose or other facial features.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible hinge or rotary joints at shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees; hands have mitten-like shapes with limited articulation.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Possible visual sensors on the face display; none clearly visible elsewhere.
